# sonarqube_alm_bitbucket (Data Source)

Use this data source to get a Bitbucket Data Center ALM definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sonarqube_alm_bitbucket" "example" {
  key = "my-bitbucket-key"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Unique key of the Bitbucket instance setting.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `url` (String) Bitbucket server API URL.
